behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction lists all test scenarios, paths (workflows/flow.py, a/b/c/file.py), patterns, and assertions explicitly.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and expected behavior without specifying code changes or implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check membership of paths in the result set, which any correct fix would produce regardless of implementation details.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests call filter_files() with real tempdirs and also run ruff subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require real inclusion of both files and parent dirs; a stub returning empty/None would fail assertions like 'workflows' in result.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover negation, nested dirs, include_dirs=False preservation, and basic functionality as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings labeling FAIL-TO-PASS vs PASS-TO-PASS.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces a set of paths, not structured data requiring a schema.

no_typos.reason: Paths and function names are consistent throughout.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the function and module but doesn't pinpoint buggy lines; localization is part of the task domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code fix task, not an agentmd-edits task.
